CustomField.description: If the Content Version is linked with a 'Send Out Schedule V2' record, it stores the value of the 'Interview Date & Time' of that record. This field may be utilized in the logic of deleting ICS files.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the Content Version is linked with a 'Send Out Schedule V2' record, it stores the value of the 'Interview Date & Time' of that record. This field may be utilized in the logic of deleting ICS files.
CustomField.label: Interview Expiration Date
